sorry_locations.notes: All 6 sorry in WrapAngle: wrapRat floor arithmetic (wrapRat_ge_lo, wrapRat_lt_hi, wrapRat_in_range, wrapRat_periodic, wrapRat_congruent, wrapRat_zero body). Need Mathlib.Algebra.Order.Floor. Atmosphere and SqrtLinear now sorry-free.

bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768
LATENT BUG (confirmed by FV + correspondence tests): wrap_bin(bin, n) returns negative for bin <= -n-1; C++ truncation mod; callers use result as array index => UB

run_history.notes: Proved 3 Atmosphere theorems (rat_inv_lt_inv_of_lt helper, Rat.add_lt_add_right, Rat.neg_mul/neg_lt_neg). Proved 3 SqrtLinear theorems via explicit axioms (sqrtBranch_zero/nonneg/lt_one). Fixed WrapAngle wrapRat_zero inner sorry (Std.lt_trans). Discovered: Std.lt_trans for Rat transitivity (vs missing Rat.lt_trans). ring/linarith/mul_sub NOT in stdlib v4.29 without imports.

run_history.tasks: Task 1 (Research: targets 31 expo + 32 lerp identified) + Task 3+4+5 (BrakingDist.lean: 9 theorems 0 sorry)

run_history.task: Task 5+8: Crc16Sig.lean (8 thms 0 sorry) + WrapBin correspondence tests (34+2360 cases)
Tasks 7+1: Critique update (338 thms, WrapBin+SqrtLinear) + 3 new research targets
Tasks 3+4: SqrtLinear spec + implementation (15 theorems, 12 proved, 3 sorry)
Tasks 5+10: WrapBin proofs (20 thms, 0 sorry, latent C++ bug confirmed) + REPORT.md update

discoveries: Std.lt_trans is the correct transitivity lemma for Rat in Lean 4.29 stdlib (Rat.lt_trans does not exist)
ring tactic is NOT available in Lean 4.29 stdlib without imports (only with Mathlib)
linarith tactic is NOT available in Lean 4.29 stdlib without imports
mul_sub is NOT available in Lean 4.29 stdlib without imports
mul_lt_mul_of_neg_left is NOT available in Lean 4.29 stdlib for Rat
Rat.inv_lt_inv_of_lt is NOT in stdlib v4.29; can be proved from Rat.mul_lt_mul_right + Rat.inv_mul_cancel
Rat.sub_lt_sub_right is NOT in stdlib v4.29; use Rat.add_lt_add_right after Rat.sub_eq_add_neg
Rat.add_lt_add_left: c + a < c + b ↔ a < b (note: iff, use .mpr/.mp)
Rat.add_lt_add_right: a + c < b + c ↔ a < b (note: iff, use .mpr/.mp)
wrapRat axiom approach: pure axiom declarations + sorry-free theorem proofs = cleaner than theorem-sorry
sqrtBranch explicit axioms (sqrtBranch_zero/nonneg/lt_one) fully resolve SqrtLinear sorry
Crc16Sig: processBits n uses structural recursion on Nat; terminates without partial
WrapBin correspondence: Python floor % matches Lean Int.% exactly (both Euclidean)
density_mono_temp sorry: fixed run 66 using rat_inv_lt_inv_of_lt helper
Commander FSM proof: rcases Bool.eq_false_or_eq_true on each Bool field generates concrete hypotheses
notes: Run 66: sorry 12->6. Atmosphere: 3 monotonicity theorems proved from first principles (no Mathlib). SqrtLinear: 3 sqrt-branch theorems proved via explicit axioms. WrapAngle: inner sorry in wrapRat_zero fixed; 6 sorry remain (floor arithmetic). Next: WrapAngle floor proofs (needs Mathlib), or new target (lerp/expo). Consider: when Mathlib becomes available, WrapAngle 6 sorry should be first priority.
